nodes.name: Stensian Road
nodes.description: The mountain road from Hofsaddel Pass toward Shadowgrange.

nodes.name: Hofsaddel Pass
nodes.description: A high overlook where travelers first see Castle Falkenrath and the outer valley.

nodes.name: Ruined Chapel
nodes.description: A collapsed roadside chapel haunted by worshippers who never finished their final rite.

nodes.name: Scorched Ritual Cave
nodes.description: A blasted cave mouth still venting sulfur and smoke after a completed summoning.

nodes.name: Roadside Shrine
nodes.description: A dormant shrine of Avacyn where Anton Wepper kneels in fear.
